## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v`

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, generated media, downloaded voices, or local config.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-facing or deployment-facing changes.
- [ ] Logs are appropriate for the configured log level.
